relations: The wheel was invented in Mesopotamia around 3500 BC
Both the internet and the wheel are inventions that significantly impacted human civilization
Johannes Gutenberg invented the printing press in the 15th century
Both the printing press and the internet revolutionized the dissemination of information
James Watt was one of the inventors who developed the steam engine in the 18th century
Thomas Newcomen was one of the inventors who developed the steam engine in the 18th century
Tim Berners-Lee is recognized for his crucial role in developing the internet, which has transformed global communication and commerce
The development of the internet paved the way for the creation of social media, changing how people communicate and share information
The invention of the internet enabled the emergence of e-commerce, altering the landscape of business and consumer behavior
Alexander Graham Bell invented the telephone, revolutionizing communication
Thomas Edison invented the light bulb, transforming artificial lighting
ENIAC was the precursor to modern computing technologies
